title: Lightweight Client-side Modpack
description: This is a lightweight modpack for the client-side that adds some performance enhancement mods and some QOL mods.
body:
This modpack is designed for the Client-side of Minecraft.

Originally created for a private server, this modpack contains many performance enhancing mods such as Lithium, Sodium, and Iris Shaders.

This modpack also includes some QOL (Quality Of Life) mods that make your gameplay experience much better. These mods include; Distant Horizons so that you can see much further, Simple Voice Chat so that you can chat with friends, and Xaero's World Map so that you can keep track of where you've been.
